name: Carrollton Loans
description_short: Carrollton Loans offers payday and title loans with same-day funding at their New Orleans location. Direct lender with no hidden fees and a referral rewards program.
description_long:
Carrollton Loans operates as a direct lender through Flexible Finance Loans, serving the New Orleans area with a physical storefront at 4240 Carrollton in the Carrollton Center neighborhood. The company positions itself as a quick-cash solution provider for consumers facing immediate financial needs between paychecks or requiring larger sums against vehicle collateral.

The company offers two primary loan products: payday loans designed as short-term solutions repaid on the borrower's next paycheck, and title loans that allow borrowers to use their vehicle's title as collateral while retaining driving privileges. Both products are marketed for speed and accessibility, with the storefront maintaining convenient business hours Monday through Saturday (9 a.m. to 6 p.m. weekdays, 9 a.m. to 1 p.m. Saturday). The company emphasizes direct lending, simple application processes, and transparent fee structures.

Carrollton Loans distinguishes itself through a unique referral rewards program that pays customers for each successful referral, regardless of whether the referrer is an existing customer. Customer reviews specifically highlight staff professionalism and personalized service, with one review praising front-desk staff member Noelle's customer service demeanor. The company operates transparently about its products and positioning within the emergency lending market.

As an emergency cash lender, Carrollton Loans serves consumers in immediate financial distress but comes with the standard caveats of high-cost lending. Payday and title loans typically carry substantially higher APRs than traditional bank loans, making them expensive solutions for short-term cash needs. Borrowers should exhaust alternatives like employer advances, credit unions, or payment plans before turning to these products, and should fully understand repayment terms before borrowing.
address: 4240 S Carrollton Ave, New Orleans, LA 70119

company_info.headquarters: 4240 S Carrollton Ave, New Orleans, LA 70119

pros: Direct lender with no hidden fees — stated transparency on pricing
Same-day or next-day funding available for emergency cash needs
Title loans allow borrowing larger amounts while keeping vehicle access
Convenient New Orleans location with extended weekday hours (9 a.m.–6 p.m.)
Unique referral rewards program pays customers for bringing in new borrowers
Positive customer reviews praising staff professionalism and service quality
Simple application process explicitly marketed for accessibility
cons: Payday and title loans carry extremely high APRs typical of the emergency lending market
Rollover risk: short-term loans can trap borrowers in debt cycles if not repaid on schedule
Title loans put vehicle at risk if borrower defaults on repayment
Limited geographic presence — only one physical location in New Orleans
No information provided about alternative products or debt counseling resources
best_for: Workers facing genuine short-term cash gaps between paychecks with reliable income
Borrowers with vehicles and immediate need for larger emergency funds who have exhausted other options
Consumers who value in-person service and local lender relationships over online lending
People with poor credit who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans or credit union products
diagnosis: Carrollton Loans is best for workers with reliable near-term income facing genuine one-time cash emergencies who have exhausted credit union PALs, employer advances, and payment plan negotiations. The critical caveat is that payday and title loans are high-cost debt solutions typically carrying 200%+ APRs annualized; they should be a last resort, not a primary lending strategy, and borrowers must have a concrete plan to repay fully on schedule to avoid debt spirals.
services: Payday loans — short-term loans repaid on next paycheck
Title loans — installment loans using vehicle title as collateral
Fast funding for emergency cash needs
In-person loan applications at physical storefront
Referral rewards program with variable compensation
Loans for borrowers with non-traditional credit profiles
